evidence_location: Experimental section > Method of synthesis > Synthesis of 2-(3-nitrophenyl)imidazo[1,2-a]pyridine (3)
evidence_quote: The yellow solid was purified by treatment with dilute HCl to yield a yellow crystalline solid, product (3); 11 g, yield: 85.60%, MP: 207–209 °C;

The crude product was purified by silica gel column chromatography (dichloromethane:methanol = 80:1 to 40:1) to afford a white solid PB02 with a melting point of 205–207 °C (307 mg, 0.83 mmol, yield 83%).

The crude product was purified by silica gel column chromatography (petroleum ether: ethyl acetate = 4:1 to 1:1) to afford a white solid PB03 (63 mg, 0.19 mmol, yield 73%) with a melting point of 214–216 °C.

After filtration and concentration under reduced pressure, the crude product was purified by silica gel column chromatography (dichloromethane: methanol = 70:1 to 50:1) to afford a white solid PB04 (316 mg, 0.95 mmol, yield 95%) with a melting point of 187–189 °C.

After filtration and concentration under reduced pressure, the crude product was purified by silica gel column chromatography (dichloromethane:methanol = 55:1 to 25:1) to afford a white solid PB05 (373 mg, 1.08 mmol, yield 80%) with a melting point of 219–221 °C.

After filtration and concentration under reduced pressure, the crude product was purified by silica gel column chromatography (dichloromethane:methanol = 55:1 to 25:1) to afford a white solid PB01 (252 mg, 0.73 mmol, yield 73%) with a melting point of 207–209 °C.
